dataset_info.name: Impacts
dataset_info.description: Measured and demonstrated changes resulting from initiatives and projects.

records.name: Improved Water Quality in Amazon Tributaries
records.description: Documented improvement in water quality metrics in monitored Amazon tributaries through community monitoring and pollution alert systems.
records.evidence: Water quality testing data from 50 monitoring stations showing 15% reduction in contaminants over 2 years.

records.name: Increased Farm Resilience in East Africa
records.description: Measurable increase in farm resilience through water retention landscape implementation, including improved soil moisture and crop yields.
records.evidence: Soil moisture readings showing 40% improvement; farmer surveys reporting increased yields during drought periods.

records.name: Local Food Access Improved
records.description: Increased community access to locally-produced food through the regional food hub network, supporting food sovereignty and farmer livelihoods.
records.evidence: Hub sales data showing 200% increase in local food transactions; community surveys reporting improved food security.

records.name: Global Knowledge Sharing Facilitated
records.description: Open-access atlas used by practitioners worldwide, facilitating knowledge transfer and replication of successful transformation strategies.
records.evidence: Platform analytics showing 50,000+ users from 100+ countries; documented case of 10 communities implementing strategies from atlas.

records.name: Community Conflict Resolution Improved
records.description: Demonstrated improvement in community conflict resolution through restorative justice practices, reducing violence and strengthening social bonds.
records.evidence: Community surveys showing 60% reduction in unresolved conflicts; facilitator reports documenting 500+ successful restorative processes.

records.name: Capital Shift from Fossil Fuels
records.description: Documented shift of investment capital away from fossil fuel companies toward regenerative alternatives through institutional divestment commitments.
records.evidence: Tracking of divestment commitments totaling $40+ billion; documented shifts in investment portfolios at 200+ institutions.
